source='demo_info.cpp' object='demo_info.o' libtool=no  depfile='.deps/demo_info.Po' tmpdepfile='.deps/demo_info.TPo'  depmode=gcc3 /bin/sh ../depcomp  clang++ -DHAVE_CONFIG_H -I. -I. -I.. -I../include   -I/usr/local/include  -O2 -pipe -D_FORTIFY_SOURCE=2 -Wformat -Wformat-security -march=core2 -fno-strict-aliasing -Wall -Wno-unused -Wno-inline -Woverloaded-virtual -Wmissing-declarations -c -o demo_info.o `test -f 'demo_info.cpp' || echo './'`demo_info.cpp
